channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flypostering, 9th May
item.description:
Queens Road Remove flypostering from 2 cable boxes by railway bridge

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen's Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parked on double yellow, 9th May
item.description:
This car has been here since at least 6.30 this morning, over 12 hours. It is dangerous because there’s always congestion here with busses which is why it’s double yellow. Can you issue tickets?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 382, Ivydale Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Waste & supermarket trolleys dumped, 9th May
item.description:
A permanent shocking eyesore in the centre of Bromley Town

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Market Square, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pallett business advert, 9th May
item.description:
For several weeks at entry to vlisr there has been a large pallett advertising a business by the workmen doing work at 1 Toynbec Close. Is this allowed as it is a real eyesore and partially blocking street sign?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beechwood Rise, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Offensive Graffiti, 9th May
item.description:
Sectarian graffiti has appeared again, same handwriting and similar message to graffiti in other places across the area. Please identify perpetrator and prosecute!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Valley Road, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
